productDisplayName: Nike Men Sweet Classic High White Shoes
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these Sweet Classic High shoes from nike are just made for you. Designed for the tennis-lover, these shoes are a great combination of comfort and style. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperLeather upper with perforated side panels for superior breathable comfort and protection from bad odour and sweatLace-ups made of durable twill tape for snug FitLightly cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfortAppliquéd swoosh on the sides to create a style statementEmbroidered logo on the back of collar for added fashionable touchHigh ankle for better support to the lower legMidsoleEVA midsole for advanced lightweight cushioningOutsoleRubber outsole in herringbone pattern for superior traction and durabilityLeaf patterned herringbone forefoot for easy movement on the courtshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store on direct sunlight
